fields.name: Dimension Value Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the intercompany dimension value type.

fields.name: Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the related record is blocked from being posted in transactions, for example a customer that is declared insolvent or an item that is placed in quarantine.

fields.name: Map-to Dimension Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the dimension code associated with the corresponding intercompany dimension.

fields.name: Map-to Dimension Value Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which dimension value corresponds to the intercompany dimension value on the line.
